allow_external_principals.description: Indicates whether principals outside of your organization can be associated with the resource share.

name.description: Name of the resource share, which must be unique and cannot contain spaces or special characters.

permission_arns.description: List of ARNs for permissions to associate with the resource share; must be valid AWS RAM permission ARNs.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to associate with the resource for categorization and organization.

timeouts.description: Defines the timeout duration for creating, updating, and deleting the resource share.
